title: Miss Melody's Mango Magic
summary: Miss Melody has a big, juicy mango, but sees her friends are hungry. She shares her mango and learns that sharing brings even more joy.

pages.text: Miss Melody had a [real] [real] big, yellow mango! It smelled so sweet, like sunshine and sugar. She was so happy to have it.
pages.imagePrompt: Illustration of Miss Melody, a cheerful young girl with brown skin and braids, holding a large, ripe, yellow mango. She's standing in front of a brightly painted Bajan house with bougainvillea flowers climbing the walls. The sun is shining, and palm trees sway gently in the background.

pages.text: She saw her friend, David, looking sad. David didn't have any snack. Miss Melody felt sorry for him.
pages.imagePrompt: Illustration showing Miss Melody looking at David who is sitting on a small wall looking sad. David is a young boy with short hair wearing a blue shirt and shorts. He is looking down with his head in his hands. A few small rocks surround him. The background has colorful houses with zinc roofs.

pages.text: Miss Melody cut her mango in half. She gave one half to David. David smiled a [real] big smile!
pages.imagePrompt: Illustration of Miss Melody handing half of her mango to David. Both are smiling and holding their respective mango halves. The mangoes are juicy and yellow. The background shows a friendly neighborhood scene with other children playing.

pages.text: Then, she saw Aisha looking hungry too. Aisha wanted to [lime] [lime] but didn't have a treat! So, Miss Melody shared her mango with Aisha too!
pages.imagePrompt: Illustration showing Miss Melody and David offering a piece of their mango to Aisha. Aisha is a young girl with pigtails and a bright yellow dress. They are sitting under the shade of a large flamboyant tree with bright red flowers. The scene is warm and inviting.

pages.text: Miss Melody had only a little bit of mango left, but she felt so happy! Sharing her mango made everyone smile. Sharing is caring!
pages.imagePrompt: Illustration showing Miss Melody, David, and Aisha all sitting together, eating the remaining mango pieces. They are all laughing and smiling. The sun is setting, casting a warm glow over the scene. A small Bajan flag waves gently in the background.
